---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or not working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: carrilloapps
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
# Exact commands that reproduce the issue
zefer encrypt ...
zefer decrypt ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error output.

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 -->
- Terminal: <!-- e.g. Windows Terminal 1.21, iTerm2, gnome-terminal -->
- Node.js version: <!-- node --version -->
- zefer-cli version: <!-- zefer --version -->

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or `.zefer` files (without sensitive content) that help explain the issue.
